name: Monthly statement ready
body_sample: Your monthly statement for your TD account ending in is now available. Log in to EasyWeb to view your statement. TD Canada Trust

name: EasyWeb login alert
subject_sample: New sign-in to your TD EasyWeb account
body_sample: We detected a new sign-in to your TD EasyWeb account. If this was you no action is required. If you did not sign in please call us immediately at 1-866-222-3456. TD Canada Trust

name: TD Visa e-statement
subject_sample: Your TD Visa statement is now available
body_sample: Your TD Visa statement is now available online. Log in to EasyWeb or the TD app to view your balance and transactions.

name: TD promotional offer
subject_sample: A special offer for TD customers
body_sample: As a valued TD customer you may be eligible for a special rate on a new TD product. Visit td.com or your local branch to learn more. No action required.

name: Interac e-Transfer received
subject_sample: INTERAC e-Transfer: You have received money
body_sample: You have received an Interac e-Transfer. To deposit your funds please log in through your bank's online banking. This transfer will expire in 30 days.
note: Real e-transfers come from Interac, not TD
